SHAKER DAHUD AGREES TO BE ADDED AS A DEFENDANT AND WAIVES SERVICE OF PROCESS. HEARING IS SET FOR SEPTEMBER 23, 2013", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-14-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:20AM
JUDGE PRO TEM JAMES FLEMING, CLERK WESLEY RAMIREZ, NOTHING ON RECORD. DEPT 525
CAUSE CALLED FOR SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL. APPELLANT, JAMES ADAMS APPEARS IN PRO PER. RESPONDENT, SHAKER DAHUD APPEARS IN PRO PER. PARTIES PREVIOUSLY SWORN, TESTIFY IN THE NARRATIVE AND RESPOND TO QUESTIONS FROM JUDGE FLEMING.

JUDGE FLEMING INQUIRES AS TO THE AGENCY OF SHAKER DAHUD AS TO PROPERTY IN QUESTION. AFTER VERIFYING SHAKER DAHUD IS INDEED THE AGENT FOR PROPERTY, MATTER PROCEEDS.

EXHR (A) FIRE INSPECTION REPORT/REQUEST
EXHR (B) PICTURES/ELECTRICAL

EXHA (1) SIGNED LETTER OF ITEMS
EXHA (2) PICTURES OF ROOF/LETTER FROM CAL INSPECTION BUREAU
EXHA (3) PICTURES (LOOSE) OF PROPERTY
EXHA (4) ITEMIZED LIST(S)/INVOICES/SUMMARY OF COSTS/LETTER FROM INSURANCE

10:52AM
NEW EVIDENCE IS RETAINED, MATTER IS SUBMITTED.

Off Calendar Sep-23-2013 Judgment Entered
